name: TEAMGROUP MP44 4TB M.2-2280 PCIe 4.0 x4 with NVMe Internal Solid State Drive - Heat Dissipating Graphene Label - 3D TLC NAND - SLC Caching - Read up to 7,400 MB/s - Write up to 6,900 MB/s - 3000TBW (TM8FPW004T0C101)
shortName: TEAMGROUP MP44 4TB M.2-2280 PCIe 4.0 x4 with NVMe
